visual_description: A man in a brown suit walks across a grassy area toward a white pickup truck parked beside a beige building with a metal gate. He passes through the open gate and enters a dimly lit interior space. Inside, the room is cluttered with chairs, tables, and various items, illuminated only by faint light from a window.
